'''Nici "The Specialist"''' was an expert counterfeit ID maker who had contacts inside the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] offices on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. His counterfeits were so good that the Imperials were unable to recognize them as fakes. When [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] tried to gain entrance into the [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]], Nici made him a clean ID for ''Han Solo'' and even changed his retinal patterns.

Nici owned a "clinic" as well as [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droids]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Paradise Snare]]'' {{1st}}
